# Hospitality Website Lane

Use for public-facing restaurant, wine list, menu, event, catering, bar, and hospitality brand sites.

Pass example: "Build Urban Kitchen's customer-facing wine list with staged categories, mobile navigation, restaurant-specific branding, and a help-me-choose entry point below the main list."

Fail example: "Put every wine, filter, explanation, admin note, and staff tool on the first screen."

Required evidence: desktop screenshot, mobile screenshot, first-screen contract, navigation proof, copy review, accessibility basics.

Forbidden by default: auth, payments, deployment, package changes, generic SaaS copy, copied reference assets, dense admin dashboards above the fold.
